headline: FLOOR-PRESSURED CONFIRMATION. Composite 14.1 (Critical) holds. State already at 14.1 deep-Critical baseline; AWR/ACC/EQU/INT all at 1.3 sub-band ceiling for Critical. Cumulative weight cannot register additional downward movement at this dimensional structure without methodology expansion. Sub-5pt calibration available but not warranting proposal.
